title: Abhishek Banerjee Signature Forgery Case: 'Bhaipo' Arrives at CID Headquarters in Kolkata Just Ahead of High Court's 6 PM Deadline
description: Calcutta HC grants interim protection to Abhishek Banerjee in signature forgery case but orders him to face CID questioning by 6 PM today. The probe centers on alleged forged MLA signatures in a disputed Assembly resolution.
